---
title: "Results"
---

::: {.callout-note}
Results will be filled in once the pipeline has been run on the full corpus.
This page is a placeholder for the main findings.
:::

## Corpus overview

| Artifact type | Count | Year range | Cities covered |
|---------------|-------|------------|----------------|
| Papers | — | — | — |
| Patents | — | — | — |
| iGEM projects | — | — | — |
| iGEM parts | — | — | — |

## Semantic space

A shared 2D projection of all artifact types.
See the [Explorer](explorer.qmd) for the interactive version.

## Clustering

Description of the main clusters found across artifact types.

## City-level patterns

Which cities show the highest concentration of synthetic biology activity?
Do they show cross-type thematic overlap?

## Carbon capture subset

Summary statistics for the carbon-capture case study slice.
Full analysis on the [Case Study: Carbon Capture](case-study.qmd) page.
